stemHtml: During a go around, the crew forgets to retract the trailing edge flaps. What could be a consequence?

options.a: Degraded climb performance and possible V<sub>FE</sub> exceedance.
options.b: Increase of climb performance and decrease angle of climb.
options.c: Increases rate of climb and decreases angle of climb.
options.d: Decreases rate of climb and increases angle of climb.
